calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerks N. Olcomendy/J. Gomez-Wong, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Parties present: Richard Alexander, attorney for pltf, defts Ben Harris and Laurie Johnson in pro per.

Cause called for trial in dept. 206, after engaging in settlement discussions the parties have reached the following settlement: Defts will vacate the premises at 141 Eddy, including Apt. 310 by Mar 11, 2002, pltf will waive all past due rents and costs. Matter will be dismissed with prejudice. If defts do not vacate premises by such date, the pltf will move by ex parte with a declaration for entry of judgment for restitution of premises and $2,638.73 rental damages and $156 costs, and forfeiture of the rental agreement.
